uplink.description: TTN Example 1: soil probe (water potential, temperature) + battery
uplink._note: Upstream uplinkDecoder Example 1 input (Decentlab v2, device id 402, flags 0x0003). Upstream reference decoder yields water_potential -11.7 kPa, soil_temperature 16.1 C, battery_voltage 3.109 V; expected = normalized mapping (water_potential -> soilWaterPotential extra in kPa, soil_temperature -> soil.temperature, battery_voltage -> battery V).
Upstream uplinkDecoder Example 2 input (flags 0x0002, battery word 0x0c25 = 3109 -> 3.109 V). No soil block present, so no soil.* keys or soilWaterPotential are emitted.

uplink.description: Synthetic full uplink: drier soil, warmer temperature, lower battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (flags 0x0003) at water-potential word 250 -> -25 kPa, soil-temp word 32891 -> 12.3 C, battery word 3000 -> 3.0 V; expected = normalized mapping of the upstream reference decoder output.
Synthetic negative case: version byte 1 instead of 2; the decoder rejects non-v2 protocol payloads.
